skill_text_en: Existence time +30%

name: 高速飞行
skill_text: 飞行速度增加35%，伤害增加20%
skill_text_en: Flight speed increased by 35%, damage increased by 20%

name: 重装旋镖
skill_text: 死亡旋镖大小增加50%
skill_text_en: Death Boomerang size increased by 50%

name: 旋转利刃
skill_text: 死亡旋镖结束后，释放2个旋转的小型利刃
skill_text_en: After the death boomerang ends, 2 small rotating blades are released.

name: 悬浮制空
skill_text: 死亡旋镖结束后，原地保留4秒
skill_text_en: After the death boomerang ends, it will stay in place for 4 seconds.

name: 猛烈震荡
skill_text: 造成伤害时晕眩敌人，持续2秒
skill_text_en: Stuns the enemy when dealing damage for 2 seconds.

name: 烈焰旋镖
skill_text: 死亡旋镖会点燃敌人，点燃效果持续3秒
skill_text_en: The death boomerang will ignite the enemy. The ignition effect lasts for 3 seconds.

name: 飞镖buff1
skill_text: 解锁【旋转利刃】选项
skill_text_en: Unlock the [Rotating Blade] option

name: 飞镖buff2
skill_text: 死亡旋镖伤害的目标0.5内减速80%
skill_text_en: The target damaged by the Death Boomerang is slowed down by 80% for 0.5 seconds

name: 飞镖buff3
skill_text: 【旋转利刃】的飞行利刃体积翻倍
skill_text_en: [Rotating Blade]'s flying blade doubles in size

name: 飞镖buff4
skill_text: 死亡旋镖伤害的怪物在5秒内收到伤害提高30%
skill_text_en: Monsters damaged by death boomers receive 30% increased damage within 5 seconds.

name: 飞镖buff5
skill_text: 解锁【悬浮制空】选项
skill_text_en: Unlock the [Hovering Air Control] option

name: 飞镖buff6
skill_text: 每弹射一次，死亡旋镖飞行速度+10%
skill_text_en: Each time it bounces, the flying speed of the death boomerang is +10%

name: 飞镖buff7
skill_text: 初始死亡旋镖数量+1，伤害降低60%
skill_text_en: The initial number of death boomerangs is +1, and the damage is reduced by 60%.
